idea: cuBLAS reference baseline
Fused hl.tile([m,n]) with inner hl.tile(k,block_size=32); K-block dot_scaled accumulate fp32; 64x64 blocks pointer 4 warps 1 stage
Widen fused MN tile to 128x128 while keeping K micro-tile 32 in inner hl.tile(k); improves tensor-core tile utilization
num_warps=8 vs iter002 4 — reg/spill regression on 128-tile dot_scaled
block_ptr indexing on iter002 layout; improves async/global path vs plain pointer
